Component.Name: CoNumFlexLayout
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 13; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Left; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 41; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Center; PACK: Center; BORDER: Enable; MARGIN: 0,0.3,0.625,0.17) REGION2(ID: UNKNOWN2; VALUE: 6; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Left; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(2) TARGET(UNKNOWN2)

Component.Name: DetailFlexLayout
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 100; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION2(ID: UNKNOWN2; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION3(ID: UNKNOWN3; VALUE: 23; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Left; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(ButtonBarVisible) = 1; MARGIN: 0,0,0,0.25; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION4(ID: UNKNOWN4; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(1) TARGET(UNKNOWN1)

Component.Name: HeaderFexLayout
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 20; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Stretch; PACK: Center; BORDER: Enable; MARGIN: 0,0.3,0.625,0.17) REGION2(ID: UNKNOWN2; VALUE: 67; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Left; PACK: Center; BORDER: Enable; MARGIN: 0,0,0,0.17) REGION3(ID: UNKNOWN3; VALUE: 8; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION4(ID: UNKNOWN4; VALUE: 5; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Left; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; MARGIN: 0,0,0,0.25) REGION5(ID: UNKNOWN5; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION6(ID: UNKNOWN6; VALUE: 23; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION7(ID: UNKNOWN7; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(0) TARGET(UNKNOWN0)

Component.Name: MainFlexLayout
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(VerticalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 19fl; ORIEN: Fill; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 81fl; ORIEN: Fill; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(0)

EventHandler.Name: CustItemChanged
EventHandler.Response:
SCRIPTTEXT(Option Explicit On Option Strict On
Imports System Imports Microsoft.VisualBasic Imports Mongoose.IDO.Protocol Imports Mongoose.Scripting
Namespace SyteLine.GlobalScripts Public Class EvHandler_CustItemChanged_4 Inherits GlobalScript
Sub Main() If ThisForm.Components("RepriceEdit").Value = "1" Then ThisForm.GenerateEvent("CalculateMarkupPrice") ThisForm.Components("PriceConvEdit").Value = ThisForm.Variab
EventHandler.Response2: les("vMarkupPrice").Value End If End Sub End Class End Namespace )

EventHandler.Name: DefineVariable
EventHandler.Response: MGCore.DefineVariables.DefineVariableSp( PARMS(VAR V(vDoSubJobs), VAR V(vResponse), RVAR V(vInfobar)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: DiscChanged
EventHandler.Response:
SCRIPTTEXT(Option Explicit On Option Strict On
Imports System Imports Microsoft.VisualBasic Imports Mongoose.IDO.Protocol Imports Mongoose.Scripting
Namespace SyteLine.GlobalScripts Public Class EvHandler_DiscChanged_2 Inherits GlobalScript
Sub Main() If ThisForm.Components("RepriceEdit").Value = "1" Then ThisForm.GenerateEvent("CalculateMarkupPrice") ThisForm.Components("PriceConvEdit").Value = ThisForm.Variables("vMarkupPrice")
EventHandler.Response2: .Value End If End Sub End Class End Namespace )

SCRIPTTEXT(Option Explicit On Option Strict On
Imports System Imports Microsoft.VisualBasic Imports Mongoose.IDO.Protocol Imports Mongoose.Scripting
Namespace SyteLine.GlobalScripts Public Class EvHandler_LaunchConfig_0 Inherits GlobalScript
Sub Main() If ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("Stat") = "H" Then ThisForm.Components("ConfigButton").Enabled = False End If ReturnValue = "0" End S

EventHandler.Name: LaunchConfig
EventHandler.Response: SLCfgMains.HandleDocumentAutoSp( PARMS(VAR P(ConfigID), VAR P(RowPointer), VAR ESTLINE, VAR SyteLineDocument, MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) DISABLED() )

EventHandler.Response: SLCfgMains.HandleDocumentAuto( PARMS(VAR P(ConfigID), VAR P(RowPointer), VAR ESTLINE, VAR SyteLineDocument, MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Response:
SCRIPTTEXT(Option Explicit On Option Strict On
Imports System Imports Microsoft.VisualBasic Imports Mongoose.IDO.Protocol Imports Mongoose.Scripting
Namespace SyteLine.GlobalScripts Public Class EvHandler_LaunchProdConfig_0 Inherits GlobalScript
Sub Main() ThisForm.Variables("NewDesc").Value = ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("Description") ReturnValue = "0" End Sub End Class End Namespace )

EventHandler.Response2: arentConfigId=V(sParentConfigId), sNameSpace=V(sNameSpace), sGroupName=V(sGroupName), sCurrencyCode=P(AdrCurrCode), IsPending=V(IsPending), sCoOrigSite=V(sCoOrigSite)) )

SCRIPTTEXT(Option Explicit On Option Strict On
Imports System Imports Microsoft.VisualBasic Imports Mongoose.IDO.Protocol Imports Mongoose.Scripting
Namespace Mongoose.GlobalScripts Public Class EvHandler_ToggleButtonBar_0 Inherits GlobalScript
Sub Main() If ThisForm.Variables("ButtonBarVisible").Value = "1" Then ThisForm.Variables("ButtonBarVisible").SetValue("0") Else ThisForm.Variables("ButtonBarVisible").Set
EventHandler.Response2: Value("1") End If ReturnValue = "0" End Sub End Class End Namespace )

EventHandler.Name: WantPriceRecalcNonZero
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCoitems.GetItemPriceAndCostSp( PARMS(VAR P(Item), VAR P(CoCustNum), VAR P(UM), VAR P(AdrCurrCode), VAR P(CoExchRate), VAR P(Reprice), VAR P(QtyOrderedConv), VAR P(CoOrderDate), VAR P(Pricecode), VAR P(FeatStr), RVAR V(PriceConv), RVAR P(CostConv), RVAR P(MatlCostConv), RVAR P(LbrCostConv), RVAR P(FovhdCostConv), RVAR P(VovhdCostConv), RVAR P(OutCostConv), MESSAGE, VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoLine), VAR P(CustItem), RVAR P(Disc)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: WantPriceRecalcOnly
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCoitems.GetItemPriceAndCostSp( PARMS(VAR P(Item), VAR P(CoCustNum), VAR P(UM), VAR P(AdrCurrCode), VAR P(CoExchRate), VAR P(Reprice), VAR P(QtyOrderedConv), VAR P(CoOrderDate), VAR P(Pricecode), VAR P(FeatStr), RVAR P(PriceConv), RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, MESSAGE, VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoLine), VAR P(CustItem), RVAR P(Disc), VAR P(DerLinePlant)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: WhseChangeValid
EventHandler.Response: SLCoitems.GetItemRefSp( PARMS(VAR P(Item), VAR C, RVAR P(RefType), MESSAGE, VAR P(ShipSite), VAR P(DerLinePlant)) )

EventHandler.Name: XRef
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCoitems.EitemXSp( PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoLine), VAR P(RefType), VAR P(RefNum), VAR P(RefLineSuf), VAR P(RefRelease), VAR P(Item), VAR P(UM), VAR P(QtyOrderedConv), VAR P(DueDate), VAR P(Whse), RVAR P(RefLineSuf), RVAR V(XrefDestination), RVAR V(CreateFlag), RVAR V(CreateFlag2), RVAR V(PromptMsg), RVAR V(PromptButtons), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: XrefCreate
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCoitems.EstItemXrefSp( PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoLine), VAR P(RefType), VAR P(RefNum), VAR P(RefLineSuf), VAR P(RefRelease), VAR P(Item), VAR P(QtyOrderedConv), VAR P(DueDate), VAR P(Whse), VAR V(MpwxrefDelete), VAR V(CreateFlag), VAR V(CreateFlag2), RVAR P(RefNum), RVAR P(RefLineSuf), RVAR P(RefRelease), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

Variable.Name: cdsmp1_FeatureMaterialsGrid
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR C(FGItemGridCol), VAR C(FGFeatureGridCol), VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoLine),VAR ,VAR P(DerLinePlant))

Variable.Name: ehm1_ItemChanged0
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR V(NewRecordFlag), VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoType), VAR P(CoOrderDate), VAR P(Item), VAR V(PrevItem), VAR P(CoCustNum), VAR, VAR P(QtyOrderedConv), VAR P(Pricecode), VAR P(DerCurrCode), RVAR P(ShipSite), RVAR P(Item), RVAR P(UM), RVAR P(Description), RVAR P(CustItem), RVAR P(PriceConv), RVAR P(FeatStr), RVAR V(ItemPlanFlag), RVAR P(DerItemFeatTempl), RVAR P(CommCode), RVAR P(UnitWeight), RVAR P(Origin), RVAR P(DueDate), RVAR P(RefType), RVAR P(RefNum), RVAR P(RefLineSuf), RVAR P(RefRelease)
Variable.Value2: , RVAR P(TaxCode1), RVAR P(Tc1Description), RVAR P(TaxCode2), RVAR P(Tc2Description), RVAR P(Disc), MESSAGE, VAR P(CoLine), RVAR P(ComSupplQtyReq), RVAR P(SupplQtyConvFactor), RVAR P(ItKit), RVAR P(PrintKitComponents),)

Variable.Name: ehm1_ValidateItemForCustItem0
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR P(Item), VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoLine), VAR P(CoRelease), VAR P(CoCustNum), VAR P(QtyOrderedConv), RVAR V(temp_DefaultUM), RVAR V(temp_DefaultDisc), RVAR, RVAR V(temp_DefaultDesc), RVAR V(temp_DefaultRefType), RVAR V(temp_DefaultRefNum), RVAR V(temp_DefaultRefLineSuf), RVAR V(temp_DefaultRefRelease), RVAR V(temp_DefaultRepriceChecked), RVAR V(temp_DefaultTaxCode1), RVAR V(temp_DefaultTaxCode2), RVAR V(temp_DefaultFeatStr), RVAR V(temp_DefaultCostConv), RVAR V(temp_DefaultStocked), RVAR V
Variable.Value2: (temp_DefaultNoChange), RVAR V(temp_DefaultProdCfg), RVAR V(temp_DefaultMatlCostConv), RVAR V(temp_DefaultLbrCostConv), RVAR V(temp_DefaultFovhdCostConv), RVAR V(temp_DefaultVovhdCostConv), RVAR V(temp_DefaultOutCostConv),)

Variable.Name: ehm2_ItemChanged0
Variable.Value: PARMS2( RVAR P(ItReservable), RVAR P(ItSerialTracked), RVAR P(ItOrderConfigurable), RVAR P(AllowOnPickList))

Variable.Name: ehm2_ValidateItemForCustItem0
Variable.Value: PARMS2( RVAR V(temp_DefaultTotCostConv), RVAR V(temp_DerItemFeatTempl), RVAR V(temp_ItSerialTracked), RVAR V(temp_DerItExist), VAR 1, VAR 0, VAR 0, VAR 0, MESSAGE, RVAR V(ItemObsSlowPrompt), RVAR V(ItemObsSlowPromptButtons), VAR, VAR 1, VAR P(AdrCurrCode), RVAR P(PriceConv), RVAR P(CostConv), RVAR P(MatlCostConv), RVAR P(LbrCostConv), RVAR P(FovhdCostConv), RVAR P(VovhdCostConv), RVAR P(OutCostConv), VAR P(CoExchRate), VAR P(CoOrderDate), VAR P(Pricecode), RVAR V(DefaultDuePeriod), RVAR P(DerCan

Variable.Name: fds_SC2
Variable.Value: OBJECT2( SL.SLFeatranks.ProdConfFeatureGroupSp( V(fds1_SecCol2MethodParms) CA(RV) DEFERREFRESHUNTILVISIBLE() LOCKMODE(Row) ) )

Variable.Name: fds1_SecCol2MethodParms
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR P(Item), VAR P(FeatStr), VAR , VAR P(DerLinePlant))

Variable.Name: fds1_SecCol3MethodParms
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR P(Item), VAR P(FeatStr), VAR , VAR P(DerLinePlant))

Variable.Name: vEstimateCoNumPlant
Variable.Value: CoCustNum, AdrName, ProspectId, CoTermsCode, TermsDescription, CoStat, CoCustPo, CoOrderDate, CoCloseDate, CoPrice, CoCost, AdrCurrCode, Pricecode, Cus0CustType, CurrencyAmtFormat, CurrencyCstPrcFormat, CoExchRate, CoOrigSite, Stat, DerLinePlant, Whse

ScriptLines.ScriptLine: ' Defaults the line number when the user changes the co num.
'To find Tax System Enabled/Disabled - used to display Tax Amounts labels & components
'To Enable/Disable Tax Code fields - labels, codes, & descriptions
'Set Tax Code type for Tax System = 1,
'at Header(CO/Est) and Line level(Lines, Freight, Misc Charges Tax codes)
'Set Tax Code type for Tax System = 2,
'at Header(CO/Est) and Line level(Lines, Freight, Misc Charges Tax codes)
'used to manage the Create Item button here. Not sure if these Features still need to be set here....
'The Sub EnableUM replaced by MayEnableUM below
'ThisForm.Variables("CurrencyPlaces").Value = "2" 'This needs to be put somewhere where we know its true value
'Update for new price only when WksBasis is NULL
'Only calculate CostConv (Total Cost) when inventory item is entered.
'If Non-Inventory item, the cost will be entered in CostConv field (total cost). Need to calc Extended Cost Amount
'Else calculate Extended Cost Amount by adding all the other extended cost amounts together.
'The CustItem is associated with an Item
'This is a never-before-seen CustItem for this Item
'Ask if the user wants to save it as a permanent association
If rVal = vbOK Or rVal = vbYes Then
'This is a never-before-seen CustItem for this Item
'but we didn't have one before so we'll just save it w/o asking
If ThisForm.Variables("AskAnswer").Value <> CStr(vbYes) Then Exit Sub
'vInfobar will be blank for a non-inventory item. Need to recalc the total cost amount
'CustItem did not change - no need to continue
Dim bEnabled As Boolean = Not IsInventoryItem() Or ThisForm.Variables("PostJourVar").GetValueOfString("") = "0"
'If a non-inventory item is entered then, all the cost fields are disable and the total cost field is enabled.
If Not (bCSIB_97770 And bFranceCP And Not allowNonItemVar) Then
If ThisForm.Components("UbItemEdit").Text <> ThisForm.Components("ItemEdit").Text Or ThisForm.Components("UbItemEdit").Text = "" Then
Dim FeatureQtys, Feature, Qtys As String
' to generate event to link to the appropriate
